title: SoBuy Wall Coat Rack Wall Shelf Storage Unit with 3 Baskets & 5 Hooks - Coat Hooks Wall Mounted for Hallway Organiser - Storage Cabinet for Coats, Bags, Scarves W100xD20xH31cm Grey FRG282-HG
features: [Versatile Wall Coat Rack] This SoBuy wall mounted coat rack features 5 strong coat hooks and 3 fabric storage baskets, making it a perfect hallway organiser to keep your home tidy and clutter-free. Its modern design fits seamlessly into any entryway, kitchen, or bathroom.

[Spacious & Durable] Constructed with high-quality MDF in a sleek grey lacquer, this wall mounted coat rack offers a solid storage solution for coats, bags, scarves, and accessories. Each hook can support up to 15kg, ensuring reliable functionality for your daily needs.

[Elegant Storage Baskets] The 3 fabric baskets add a charming touch to your hallway, providing a stylish way to store small items like scarves, keys, and umbrellas. The simple design make it perfect for various home styles.

[Easy to Assemble & Mount] The wall shelf storage unit comes flat-packed with clear, easy-to-follow instructions for quick assembly. Once installed, it measures W100 x D20 x H31cm, ideal for narrow hallways or small spaces that need extra storage.

[7 pieces hallway furniture set] shoe bench FSR64-HG, FSR82-K-HG and FSR82-L-HG, shoe cabinet FSR78-HG, FSR79-HG and FSR94-HG, wall coat rack FRG282-HG. They can be flexibly matched to meet different needs
description: Product Description Additional Storage Space The top is ideal for some decorations such as photos, vase, small plants, etc. 3 Foldable Baskets The baskets made of fabric are removable and foldable. They offer enough storage space for the keys, letters and the other small items. 5 Metal Hooks 5 metal hooks are ideal for jackets, coats, scarfs, handbags, etc. Easy to Clean Made of high quality MDF, easy to maintain and clean. Wall Coat Rack FRG282-HG Color: Grey. Dimensions: W100 x D20 x H31cm. Material: MDF, fabric. Weight: 9kg. Load capacity: 15kg.
